technology_description: A combined cycle gas turbine (CCGT) system utilizing ammonia (NH3) as fuel, featuring a gas turbine and a heat recovery steam generator (HRSG) to produce electricity. The system operates with a closed-loop configuration, optimizing thermal efficiency through waste heat recovery.

A system designed to store thermal energy at elevated temperatures using materials with high heat capacity, such as molten salts or ceramics, enabling efficient heat retention and release for industrial processes, concentrated solar power, or seasonal thermal applications. Operates within temperature ranges typically exceeding 300°C, with configurations including insulated storage tanks, heat exchangers, and phase-change material containment units.

The system includes safety valves, pressure sensors, and insulation to manage thermal expansion and ensure containment under extreme conditions.

A high-pressure storage system utilizing cylindrical or spherical tanks constructed from carbon steel or stainless steel, reinforced with carbon fiber composites to withstand extreme pressures (up to 1000 psi). Equipped with safety valves, pressure gauges, and insulation to minimize thermal losses. Designed for long-term underground or above-ground storage of compressed CO₂, with leakage prevention mechanisms and corrosion-resistant coatings.
technology_variant: Cylindrical pressure vessel with carbon fiber overwrap and dual-layer stainless steel liner
main_operation_unit: Pressurized CO₂ storage vessel with integrated compression chamber

technology_description: A pressurized storage system designed to hold carbon monoxide (CO) gas at high pressures within a robust tank structure, typically constructed from materials such as steel or carbon fiber composites to ensure safety and efficiency. The system includes mechanisms for gas injection, pressure regulation, and containment under operational conditions.

A tank storage system designed for the secure containment of liquid fuels such as diesel and kerosene, featuring robust materials, pressure regulation, and safety mechanisms to prevent leaks and ensure operational integrity.
technology_variant: C12 Standard Liquid Fuel Tank (Double-Walled Corrosion-Resistant Steel)
